market_overview: Market sentiment is stabilizing following a high-velocity tech rally. Sector rotation is now favoring established infrastructure proxies and high-utilization energy service providers, with a specific focus on Data Centre execution and recurring revenue models.

top_picks.name: INARI
top_picks.analysis: Inari is consolidating healthily after its RM1.80 breakout. The removal of the Lumileds deal overhang continues to act as a long-term valuation tailwind for the RF segment.

deep_dive.thesis: Re-rating consolidation phase. The market is absorbing recent gains, establishing a new floor above RM 2.00 as institutions re-weight their tech portfolios for 2Q2026.

top_picks.name: IJM
top_picks.analysis: Building momentum following the RM658m hyperscale DC contract. The pivot to digital infrastructure is driving a multi-year order book expansion.

deep_dive.thesis: Data Centre infrastructure is the dominant theme. IJM's expertise in specialized DC construction provides a higher margin profile than traditional civil works.
catalysts: Potential for special dividends from asset disposals

top_picks.name: VELESTO
top_picks.analysis: Top penny stock pick. Anticipation of a special dividend from the Naga 3 sale and high rig utilization (>85%) provides a strong fundamental floor.

deep_dive.thesis: Cash flow generation play. Velesto has transitioned into a lean, profitable operator with clear line of sight on 2026 earnings from Petronas contracts.

top_picks.name: ITMAX
top_picks.analysis: Smart City giant continues to execute on its Johor rollout. High-margin recurring income model makes it a premier defensive growth compounder.

deep_dive.thesis: Monopoly-like smart city contracts. As more local councils adopt AI-surveillance, ITMAX's proprietary software layer drives significant margin expansion.
risks: Political budget changes in local councils
